site.title: 90 Reasons to Celebrate — Costa Rica 2026
site.description: Barkay & Shani Wolfsohn's Costa Rica trip — La Fortuna, the Caribbean coast & Tortuguero, September/October 2026

days.title: Day 1 — Arrival
days.theme: Land in San José and settle in for the night.

items.text: Check into Hampton by Hilton San José Airport

days.note: 💡 Stay close to SJO Airport to avoid city traffic.

days.title: Day 2 — Drive to La Fortuna
days.theme: Head north from San José toward the Arenal Volcano area.

items.text: Check out of Hampton by Hilton San José Airport

days.note: 💡 4-hour drive. Leave early to avoid heavy afternoon rain.

days.title: Day 3 — Explore the Arenal Area
days.theme: Perfect for hikes, hot springs, or ziplines.
days.note: 💡 Nothing booked yet for this day — pick from hikes, hot springs, or ziplines once there.

days.title: Day 4 — Explore the Arenal Area
days.theme: Hanging bridges or La Fortuna Waterfall.
days.note: 💡 Nothing booked yet — hanging bridges or La Fortuna Waterfall are both options.

days.title: Day 5 — Last Day in La Fortuna
days.theme: Final day for adventure tours before heading to the coast.
days.note: 💡 Nothing booked yet — last chance for any adventure tours in La Fortuna.

days.title: Day 6 — Drive to the Caribbean Coast
days.theme: Transit day from Arenal to Puerto Viejo.

items.text: Check into Cariblue Beach and Jungle Resort

days.note: 💡 5–6 hours transit. Monitor Route 32 via Waze.

days.title: Day 7 — Caribbean Coast
days.theme: Rent bikes, visit town, or hit Cocles beach.
days.note: 💡 Nothing booked yet — bikes, town, or Cocles beach are all options.

days.title: Day 8 — Caribbean Coast
days.theme: Day trip to Cahuita National Park for hiking/wildlife.
days.note: 💡 Nothing booked yet — Cahuita National Park is the leading option.

days.title: Day 9 — Caribbean Coast
days.theme: Visit Manzanillo Refuge or relax by the beach.
days.note: 💡 Nothing booked yet — Manzanillo Refuge or beach time.

days.title: Day 10 — Travel Toward Tortuguero
days.theme: Group drives to La Pavona; Yoav splits off toward San José.

items.text: Check out of Cariblue Beach and Jungle Resort

days.note: 💡 TODO: no lodging is booked for the night of Sep 28 — Mawamba Lodge check-in isn't until Tue Sep 29 at 12:30 PM, so there's an unaccounted night near La Pavona/Guápiles that still needs a place to stay. Group: drive to La Pavona (3.5–4.5h), park the car, take the boat over. Yoav: 6:00 AM shuttle from Puerto Viejo direct to SJO Airport, arriving before 4:00 PM — TODO confirm who Yoav is and their travel details; not on the United confirmation we have.

days.title: Day 11 — Boat to Tortuguero
days.theme: Boat in to Tortuguero and check into Mawamba Lodge.

items.text: Check into Mawamba Lodge (boat or plane access only)

days.note: 💡 No public or private boats leave La Pavona dock after 4:00 PM — call the lodge before starting transit. Reception is closed 8:00 PM–5:30 AM.

days.title: Day 12 — Tortuguero National Park
days.theme: Full day for a morning canoe canal tour and wildlife spotting.
days.note: 💡 Nothing booked yet — plan is a morning canoe canal tour.

days.title: Day 13 — Return to the Capital
days.theme: Boat and drive back to San José ahead of the flight home.
days.note: 💡 TODO: no lodging is booked for the night of Oct 1 in San José, ahead of the next day's flight. Take the early morning boat out of Tortuguero, pick up the car at La Pavona, and drive back via Route 32 before sunset.

days.title: Day 14 — Departure
days.note: 💡 Flight at 12:00 PM — head straight to the airport and arrive by 9:00 AM.

lodging.name: Hampton by Hilton San José Airport
lodging.address: Hwy 1 Airport Blvd, Alajuela, Costa Rica
notes: Booked under Shani Wolfsohn's Hilton Honors account — 1 King Bed Nonsmoking.
Free cancellation until 11:59 PM Sep 18, 2026 — after that, first night's room + tax is charged.

lodging.name: Fortuna Retreat
notes: PIN 0147 — keep private, it can modify/cancel the booking.
3 rooms: Double Room with Garden View ($804.90), Suite with Private Pool ($1,079.90), Double Room with Garden View ($768.90).

lodging.name: Cariblue Beach and Jungle Resort
lodging.address: Playa Cocles, 1.5 km south of Puerto Viejo, Costa Rica
notes: PIN 2495 — keep private, it can modify/cancel the booking.
3 rooms: King Bungalow with Jungle View ($862.56), King Room with Garden View ($687.39), King Room with Garden View ($648.51).
Free cancellation until Sep 21, 2026 11:59 PM (2 days before arrival).

lodging.name: Mawamba Lodge
lodging.address: Canales de Tortuguero, Limón, Costa Rica
notes: PIN 8807 — keep private, it can modify/cancel the booking.
Access is by boat or plane only. Lodge offers boat transfers from La Pavona/Guápiles dock for an extra cost — no boats depart La Pavona after 4:00 PM.
Reception closed 8:00 PM–5:30 AM; check-in not possible outside those hours.
Free cancellation until Sep 21, 2026 11:59 PM (7 days before arrival).
